texto: I'm a diplomat by nature. I help find the middle ground. I crack a joke and use humour to help resolve potentially vicious situations quickly. It gets things in perspective and helps everyone to see that things aren't as bad as they seem.
explicacao: Citação de Ronnie Wood sobre temas ligados a humor. “I'm a diplomat by nature. I help find the middle ground. I crack a joke and use humour to help re…” articula humor, perspective, help em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como help e see.
